records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, it doesn't seem to reach anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naturally, a Counter's ability weakens the farther it is from the body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naturally, a Counter's ability weakens the farther it is from the body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And your ability... It seems like the distance between you and me is the limit right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knowing your own limits will help in real situations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here's a question. What would you do if there's an armed criminal outside your ability's range.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here's a question. What would you do if there's an armed criminal outside your ability's range.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here's a question. What would you do if there's an armed criminal outside your ability's range.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know! Run and close the distance!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know! Run and close the distance!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know! Run and close the distance!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not wrong. But what if the criminal runs away at the same speed as you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not wrong. But what if the criminal runs away at the same speed as you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not wrong. But what if the criminal runs away at the same speed as you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's unfair!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's unfair!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's unfair!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fighting is just like that. It's not always about who's stronger, but who can turn the situation in their favor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fighting is just like that. It's not always about who's stronger, but who can turn the situation in their favor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fighting is just like that. It's not always about who's stronger, but who can turn the situation in their favor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When that happens, try provoking the opponent. Make them have no choice but to approach you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When that happens, try provoking the opponent. Make them have no choice but to approach you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When that happens, try provoking the opponent. Make them have no choice but to approach you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It means making them upset. Simply insult them or use lies to trigger them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It means making them upset. Simply insult them or use lies to trigger them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It means making them upset. Simply insult them or use lies to trigger them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the criminal has an accomplice nearby, you can use that person as leverage to threaten the criminal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the criminal has an accomplice nearby, you can use that person as leverage to threaten the criminal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the criminal has an accomplice nearby, you can use that person as leverage to threaten the criminal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It might feel harsh right now, but... you'll understand once you go through it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It might feel harsh right now, but... you'll understand once you go through it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It might feel harsh right now, but... you'll understand once you go through it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There will come a time when you'll feel that winning is the only option, no matter how it happens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There will come a time when you'll feel that winning is the only option, no matter how it happens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There will come a time when you'll feel that winning is the only option, no matter how it happens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that just now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that just now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A meteorite?
